title: Sands of Time
description: A Relics addon that adds the Entropic Hourglass: a time-bending relic found through desert archaeology. Accelerate machines, crops, and entities!
body:
# Sands of Time

**Sands of Time** is an addon for the [Relics](https://modrinth.com/mod/relics-mod) mod that adds the **Entropic Hourglass**, an ancient relic that lets you bend time itself.

Discovered through **archaeology** in desert pyramids and desert wells, this hourglass passively absorbs temporal energy and lets you spend it to accelerate the world around you.

---

## The Entropic Hourglass

A curio charm with three powerful abilities that grow stronger as you level up.

### Chrono-Accumulation (Passive)
The hourglass passively absorbs temporal energy while sitting in any inventory slot. Your stored time is shown as a HUD overlay and fuels all active abilities. Higher levels mean faster accumulation.

### Temporal Injection (Unlocks at Level 3)
Right-click any block to inject temporal energy, accelerating it for **30 seconds**:
- **Machines & Tile Entities** — Furnaces smelt faster, hoppers transfer faster, brewing stands brew faster
- **Crops & Nature** — Wheat, carrots, saplings, sugar cane, cactus, and any randomly-ticking block grow at incredible speeds
- Click the same block to **cycle through speed multipliers** (2x → 4x → 8x → ... up to 512x!)
- Maximum speed scales with ability level

### Bio-Overclock (Unlocks at Level 8)
Right-click a living entity to overclock its biological processes for **30 seconds**:
- Speed up animal growth, mob AI, and entity behavior
- Re-click to extend duration or upgrade speed
- Requires line of sight — cannot target players

---

## How to Obtain

The Entropic Hourglass is found through **archaeology** — brush suspicious sand in:
- **Desert Pyramids** (~5% chance)
- **Desert Wells** (~5% chance)

---

## Configuration

Fully configurable through the in-game Mods menu:
- **Block Blacklist** — prevent specific blocks from being accelerated
- **Entity Blacklist** — prevent specific entities from being overclocked
- **HUD Display Mode** — action bar, top-left overlay, or disabled

---

## License

MIT, feel free to include in modpacks! <3
